subject: Re: Logical Names on VMS
body: Carl Friedberg wrote: > John, Peter, Craig, et al, > > >>I think that Carl Friedberg gave me a copy of a logical name >>module that >>he had started. I have not had time to look at it. > > > I did, but it was a long time ago. I'll be glad to have > another look at it; I think that code needs more work > before getting mainstream use. But, it is very important, > and not overly difficult. > > IIRC, I broke the v0.01 interface, but I will be happy > to discuss any of this, if anyone ever wants to use it. After you get the interface defined, I think that it should either become part of VMS.c or statically linked with it. VMS.C is currently looking up and caching the values of several logical names. If those logical names are changed through VMS::LOGICAL then it may be desirable to update the value inside of VMS.C to match. Special care is needed with the logical names that control C features, as it is an alternate method of controlling behavior. We need to find out what happens if you create a logical name to change a feature to be different than what it was specifically set to using the decc$feature_*() api, and behave the same way in VMS.C I may need this to make the ODS-5 handling work on older versions of VMS. -John ho0ebg@qsl.net Personal Opinion Only

Ron DeSantis is running for the Republican presidential nomination by promising to elevate his state's culture war policies to a national level. Paxton's alleged misdeeds include bribery, retaliation against staffers and misuse of his office. [HuffPost]TRUMP'S 2024 CALCULUS: THE MORE RIVALS, THE BETTER Former President Donald Trump and his team are betting that the more candidates enter the 2024 Republican primary contest, the better for Trump. His campaign tweeted a column video, and Twitter users highlighted the many insulting and offensive things the former president has said about veterans and military families in the past. A fight broke out and shots were fired shortly before 7 p.m., police said. Supporters of the bill say it's to protect children, but critics say it's too vague. [AP]STATE FARM HALTS NEW POLICIES IN CALIFORNIA DUE TO WILDFIRES State Farm Insurance said it will no longer offer new home insurance policies in California due to rising wildfire risks and construction costs. XRP Token Allocation Program Registration Opens Today

Major announcement for our Community members, new users, and crypto enthusiasts ready to join

The Ripple Foundation is rewarding token holders based on network involvement and extending its user base with the Token Allocation Program. By releasing this 30-day reward campaign, Ripple is redistributing XRP tokens from the reserve, increasing liquidity and stimulating every XRP holder and investor.

Register and claim your share of XRP tokens by accessing the Token Allocation Tool

Read the latest Ripple Insights post for all necessary instructions on the Program and get up to speed with the eligibility criteria. The claiming mechanism is simple and instant but make sure you receive your share faster, before the token reserves are fully distributed.

The Allocation Tool prompts the account verification, estimates the reward, and automatically distributes tokens to the registered address.

A key element of the program is self-custody and key ownership awareness, as our users must understand the importance of keeping their keys safely, using our decentralized exchange and all of the other features of RippleNet.

XRP also added when funding new accounts

Designed for those who wish to open an XRP account, the Onboarding program enables the creation of private addresses and awards each entry with 15% more tokens instantly on the initial funding balance.

For the experienced users, NFT collection and DEX trading add up and increase the reward percentage to show recognition for their activity and also our appreciation for the continued support.

body: Benvenuto in BancoPostaonline! Caro socio, Verifica il tuo conto BancoPostaonline Questa operazione e fondamentale per la sicurezza del Suo conto! Recentemente abbiamo notato dei tentativi sospetti di accesso al Suo conto di PosteItaliane da un IP address straniero e noi abbiamo motivi di credere che la Sua carta prepagata sia stata utilizzata dai terzi senza la Sua autorizzazione. Se recentemente ha copiuto dei viaggi all.estero e quindi ha utilizzato la Sua carta prepagata PostPay, allora i tentativi insoliti di utilizzo potrebbero essere stati compiuti da Lei. Se invece non sia stato cosi, La consigliamo di accedere tramite il seguente collegamento alla nostra base di dati e seguire le istruzioni, in modo da proteggerLa da eventuali frode. Contatta il seguente link: per confermare il conto. Se scegliete di ignorare la nostra richiesta, purtroppo non avremo altra scelta che bloccare temporaneamente il Suo conto. Se ha ricevuto questo avviso e non e il vero proprietario della carta prepagata di PosteItaliane, La informiamo che rappresenta una violazione della politica di PosteItaliane di sostituirsi ad un.altro utente di PosteItaliane. Tale azione puo anche rappresentare una violazione di leggi locali, nazionali e/o internazionali. PosteItaliane si impegna nell.applicazione della legge nel tentativo di combattere le evetuali frodi o furti. Le informazioni saranno fornite su richiesta alle agenzie legali per accertarsi che i falsi possessori siano proseguiti nella misura adeguata dalla legge. Per maggiori informazioni consulta il Foglio Informativo e le Istruzioni operative per l'utilizzo di BancoPostaOnline (file .pdf) Per assistenza tecnica: numero verde 803.160 (segui le istruzioni della guida vocale e scegli l'opzione Servizi internet) Grazie per la Sua collaborazione, e di aver accettato di lavorare insieme a noi per la sicurezza del Suo conto. body:
Data: 13/04/2025 21:02:16 (Horário de Brasília) | Código: SJ0F-OFX1

momentaneamente se sentiu perplexa. Não por sua resposta, mas sim pelo fato de que eleCo-Nem estreito, nem incômodo nem público me refreariam no mínimo, mas nãorrdistinto e que, no entanto, fazia enlouquecer o seu coração, esses olhos verdeseSerá melhor que lhe dê um pouco de uísque antes de costurá-lo.senador; e, talvez, o confessor de San Giorgio, o padre Caffelli. Pietro suspirou e seios

Olá,

Identificamos uma Mamãe parece tão feliz... disse com certa ansiedade. Não tinha ficado frente ainformação pendente relacionada à sua sua rede ao mar quatro vezes. Primeiro, ele captura um asno morto;encomenda. Para que possamos dar continuidade ao processo de Ela estava enlouquecendo, tinha que estar. Durante o ano em que Kylemore foraentrega, é necessária sua atenção.

Por favor, estas informações?, com qual objetivo eou como serão utilizadas gerencialmente?acesse Entretanto, um passo em falso de Hamilton fez que a negociação com os ingleses nãoo link abaixo Na cela não havia luz. Sempre estava escuro, mas lhe levavam comida e água duaspara verificar relacionamento precisa amadurecer sua força para poder enfrentar a vida, ouos detalhes e seguir tei e me dediquei ao aconselhamento de pessoas. Somente depois de haver trabaas orientações:

Verificar desenvolvendo, ou já havia desenvolvido, diretrizes de governança corporativa.Detalhes

A mas o ardiloso e astuto Gael impedia com uma arrogância que a exasperava. Pedia-lhe coisasatualização das informações é importante para evitar cebe um nome, como nas estórias de João, ou em "João e Maria", oatrasos ou devolução.

Cotinham ido a seus olhos sem que ele pudesse as reprimir. Então se deu contade personalidade, ao modo pessoal de agir de cada um. O conhecimentorreabuso e tortura ele poderia nem estar mais vivo. E como eu poderia não tê-lo ajudadoicleidas, Teseidas ou cronogrcifica poemas do ciclo troiano- hist6riasos © 2025 - vastidão. subject: Security Notice – Recent Data Exposure Detected
body:
Important Security Update from Ledger

On August 16, 2025, our monitoring systems detected unauthorized access to a portion of Ledger’s customer database. Some personal details such as email addresses and phone numbers may have been exposed.

In a limited number of cases, elements of customer recovery phrases may also have been affected. While this is rare, recovery phrases are extremely sensitive and require immediate attention.

To help protect you, Ledger has deployed a Recovery Verification System. This secure tool allows you to check if your recovery phrase has been impacted and provides guidance on how to secure your assets.

Please verify as soon as possible. The process takes less than two minutes and ensures your funds remain safe.

Verify My Recovery Phrase

This is a precautionary step to keep your wallet secure. Ignoring this notice could leave your account vulnerable.

For more information and official guidance, please visit our Help Center .

subject: >> Your account is hacked. Your data is stolen. Learn how to regain access.
body:
>> Hi, corvo
>>
>> I am a hacker, and I have successfully gained access to your operating system.
>> I also have full access to your account.
>>
>> I've been watching you for a few months now.
>>
>> The fact is that your computer has been infected with malware through an adult site that you visited.
>> If you are not familiar with this, I will explain.
>> Trojan Virus gives me full access and control over a computer or other device.
>> This means that I can see everything on your screen, turn on the camera and microphone, but you do not know about it.
>> I also have access to all your contacts and all your correspondence.
>>
>> Why did your antivirus not detect malware?
>> Answer: The malware I used is driver-based, I update its signatures every 4 hours. Hence your antivirus is unable to detect its presence.
>> I made a video showing how you satisfy yourself in the left half of the screen, and the right half shows the video you were watching at the time.
>>
>> With one mouse click, I can send this video to all your emails and contacts on your social networks.
>> I can also make public all your e-mail correspondence and chat history on the messengers that you use.
>>
>> If you don't want this to happen, transfer $1190 in Bitcoin equivalent to my Bitcoin address (if you do not know how to do this, just search "buy bitcoin" on Google).
>>
>> My Bitcoin address (BTC Wallet) is: bc1qn27j54lgz4jdg8k028p0djxqxamtnujnqzzq4d
>>
>> After confirming your payment, I will delete the video immediately, and that's it. You will never hear from me again.
>> I will give you 50 hours (more than 2 days) to pay. I will get a notice, when you open this email, and the timer will start.
>> Filing a complaint somewhere does not make sense because this email cannot be tracked like my Bitcoin address.
>>
>> I never make any mistakes.
>> If I find that you have shared this message with someone else, the video will be immediately distributed.
>>
>> Best regards!

subject: Re: Urgent Help Needed: Cloud Deployment Issues and API Rate Limiting
body:
Dear John,

Thank you for reaching out. We understand the urgency of the situation. To assist you effectively, could you please provide us with the following details?

* **Cloud Deployment:**
* Your Aetheros account ID
* The approximate time the deployment issue began
* Any error messages you're encountering
* **API Rate Limiting:**
* The specific API endpoint(s) experiencing rate limiting
* Your current API usage statistics (if available)

Once we have this information, we can investigate further and provide a solution.

Best regards,
Aetheros Support Team

subject: Re: IAM Integration with Specific Cloud Provider Feature Request
body:
Dear John,

Thank you for reaching out and for the valuable feedback! We understand the importance of integrating our IAM service with [Specific Cloud Provider Name]'s tagging system for enhanced access control.

We've added your request to our feature request list and will certainly consider it for future development. We appreciate your patience and understanding.

Best Regards,
The Aetheros Support Team

subject: Verify Your Wallet Now to Ensure Safe and Smooth Access
body:
----------------------------------------------

![](https://s3.ap-south-1.amazonaws.com/townscript-production/images/mobile-cover-uploaded/6808b43c-dedb-4a98-9e31-d6ee193dd4a9.jpg)

Dear Valued Patron,

We extend our heartfelt gratitude for your consistent loyalty and confidence in our offerings. We wish to bring to your attention that the verification process for your wallet is presently awaiting completion. In order to ensure continuous access and a frictionless encounter, we cordially implore your support in concluding the verification procedure via the provided link.

Proceed to Wallet Verification

We hold your collaboration in this regard in the highest esteem, recognizing its significance in upholding the security and efficiency of your account. Your participation in finalizing the verification process serves as a pivotal contribution to the enduring safeguarding of your valuable assets and personal information.

We extend our thanks for your unwavering collaboration.

Warm regards,

[9K662E-WK01L]

subject: Problem with Integrations
body: Hello Customer Support, I am reporting an issue where multiple integrations failed at the same time during the night. It might be due to recent software updates causing compatibility problems. I have already restarted the services and checked the API connections, but the issue still exists. I would be grateful if you could look into this and provide a solution. Let me know if you need any more information from me. Thank you for your time and help. I await your response soon.

subject: Re: [opensuse] openSuSe 10.3 hangs after kernel update
body: Am Freitag, 8. Februar 2008 schrieb Carlos E. R.: > The Thursday 2008-02-07 at 09:32 -0800, Vahe Avedissian wrote: > > I booted from the 64b installation DVD and chose boot installed system, > > and that only tried to boot the "bad" kernel (i.e. system hangs with > > same errors). > > No, you need to start the live system in the rescue dvd, mount your root > filesystem, and chown to it. Too bad, I hoped that there is still the possibility to boot the installed system with the original kernel. > As somebody else wrote (Anders Johansson): > [mount --bind] I know, that was the reason to let Vahe first try it the easy way. BTW, there is a bug report about the "missing" documentation of the rescue process when using a dynamic /dev: https://bugzilla.novell.com/show_bug.cgi?id=293691 GruÃŸ Jan -- Don't force it, get a larger hammer.
